message:
test(e2e): add Playwright E2E tests for RU pages

Add comprehensive Playwright E2E tests for Repo Updater (RU) covering:
- RU tool page loading and code examples
- RU lesson page with interactive elements
- RU on landing and flywheel pages
- RU glossary entries (agent-sweep)
- RU commands reference
- Navigation to RU from learn and flywheel
- RU synergy explanations visibility

Closes bead yn18 - ACTUALLY implemented (not deferred).
